1.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
1.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
1.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a stringed instrument; by extension, a poem set to music; specifically, an epigram
David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes

2.gl: properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally a person; also (from the rapid breathing in passion) ire
2.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

2.gl: to be right (i.e. correct); reciprocal, to argue; causatively, to decide, justify or convict
2.kj: appoint, argue, chasten, convince, correct(-ion), daysman, dispute, judge, maintain, plead, reason (together), rebuke, reprove(-r), surely, in any wise.

2.gl: heat; figuratively, anger, poison (from its fever)
2.kj: anger, bottles, hot displeasure, furious(-ly, -ry), heat, indignation, poison, rage, wrath(-ful). See H2529 (חֶמְאָה).

2.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
2.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.

2.gl: to chastise, literally (with blows) or figuratively (with words); hence, to instruct
2.kj: bind, chasten, chastise, correct, instruct, punish, reform, reprove, sore, teach.

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

3.gl: properly, to bend or stoop in kindness to an inferior; to favor, bestow; causatively to implore (i.e. move to favor by petition)
3.kj: beseech, [idiom] fair, (be, find, shew) favour(-able), be (deal, give, grant (gracious(-ly), intreat, (be) merciful, have (shew) mercy (on, upon), have pity upon, pray, make suppli

3.gl: to tremble inwardly (or palpitate), i.e. (figuratively) be (causative, make) (suddenly) alarmed or agitated; by implication to hasten anxiously
3.kj: be (make) affrighted (afraid, amazed, dismayed, rash), (be, get, make) haste(-n, -y, -ily), (give) speedy(-ily), thrust out, trouble, vex.

3.gl: properly, to mend (by stitching), i.e. (figuratively) to cure
3.kj: cure, (cause to) heal, physician, repair, [idiom] thoroughly, make whole. See H7503 (רָפָה).

3.gl: a bone (as strong); by extension, the body; figuratively, the substance, i.e. (as pron.) selfsame
3.kj: body, bone, [idiom] life, (self-) same, strength, [idiom] very.

3.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
3.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
I, (as for) me, mine, myself, we, [idiom] which, [idiom] who.

4.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
4.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

4.gl: properly, vehemence, i.e. (with or without preposition) vehemently; by implication, wholly, speedily, etc. (often with other words as an intensive or superlative; especially when repeated)
4.kj: diligently, especially, exceeding(-ly), far, fast, good, great(-ly), [idiom] louder and louder, might(-ily, -y), (so) much, quickly, (so) sore, utterly, very ([phrase] much, sore),

4.gl: to tremble inwardly (or palpitate), i.e. (figuratively) be (causative, make) (suddenly) alarmed or agitated; by implication to hasten anxiously
4.kj: be (make) affrighted (afraid, amazed, dismayed, rash), (be, get, make) haste(-n, -y, -ily), (give) speedy(-ily), thrust out, trouble, vex.

4.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
4.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

4.gl: properly, extent (of time); but used only adverbially (especially with other particle prefixes), when (either relative or interrogative)
4.dv: from an unused root meaning to extend;

4.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
4.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

5.gl: to turn back (hence, away) transitively or intransitively, literally or figuratively (not necessarily with the idea of return to the starting point); generally to retreat; often adverbial, again
5.kj: ((break, build, circumcise, dig, do anything, do evil, feed, lay down, lie down, lodge, make, rejoice, send, take, weep)) [idiom] again, (cause to) answer ([phrase] again), [idiom]

5.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
5.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

5.gl: to pull off; hence (intensively) to strip, (reflex.) to depart; by implication, to deliver, equip (for fight); present, strengthen
5.kj: arm (self), (go, ready) armed ([idiom] man, soldier), deliver, draw out, make fat, loose, (ready) prepared, put off, take away, withdraw self.

5.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
5.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

5.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
5.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.

5.gl: properly, heed, i.e. purpose; used only adverbially, on account of (as a motive or an aim), teleologically, in order that
5.kj: because of, to the end (intent) that, for (to,... 's sake), [phrase] lest, that, to.

6.gl: physically, to throw (a stone, an arrow) at or away; especially to revere or worship (with extended hands); intensively, to bemoan (by wringing the hands)
6.dv: a primitive root; used only as denominative from H3027 (יָד); literally, to use (i.e. hold out) the hand;

6.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
6.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
6.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

6.gl: who? (occasionally, by a peculiar idiom, of things); also (indefinitely) whoever; often used in oblique construction with prefix or suffix
6.kj: any (man), [idiom] he, [idiom] him, [phrase] O that! what, which, who(-m, -se, -soever), [phrase] would to God.
6.dv: an interrogative pronoun of persons, as H4100 (מָה) is of things,

6.gl: death (natural or violent); concretely, the dead, their place or state (hades); figuratively, pestilence, ruin
a memento, abstractly recollection (rarely if ever); by implication, commemoration
Hades or the world of the dead (as if a subterranean retreat), including its accessories and inmates

7.gl: properly, a twist (away of the light), i.e. night; figuratively, adversity
7.dv: or (Isaiah 21:11) לֵיל; also לַיְלָה; from the same as H3883 (לוּל);

7.gl: a bed (as extended) forsleeping or eating; by analogy, a sofa, litter or bier
properly, to gasp; hence, to be exhausted, to tire, to toil

7.dv: from an unused root meaning perhaps to arch;

7.kj: make to consume away, (make to) melt, water.

8.gl: an eye (literally or figuratively); by analogy, a fountain (as the eye of the landscape)
8.kj: affliction, outward appearance, [phrase] before, [phrase] think best, colour, conceit, [phrase] be content, countenance, [phrase] displease, eye((-brow), (-d), -sight), face, [phra

8.gl: to cramp, literally or figuratively, transitive or intransitive
8.kj: adversary, (be in) afflict(-ion), beseige, bind (up), (be in, bring) distress, enemy, narrower, oppress, pangs, shut up, be in a strait (trouble), vex.

8.gl: to remove (intransitive or transitive) figuratively, to grow old; specifically, to transcribe
8.kj: copy out, leave off, become (wax) old, remove.
anger, angry, grief, indignation, provocation, provoking, [idiom] sore, sorrow, spite, wrath.

9.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)
9.kj: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, ma
be(-head), bring, call back, decline, depart, eschew, get (you), go (aside), [idiom] grievous, lay away (by), leave undone, be past, pluck away, put (away, down), rebel, remove (to

9.gl: strictly nothingness; also trouble. vanity, wickedness; specifically an idol
9.kj: affliction, evil, false, idol, iniquity, mischief, mourners(-ing), naught, sorrow, unjust, unrighteous, vain, vanity, wicked(-ness). Compare H369 (אַיִן).
9.dv: from an unused root perhaps meaning properly, to pant (hence, to exert oneself, usually in vain; to come to naught);

9.kj: [phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thun
9.dv: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;

9.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
9.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

9.gl: to do or make (systematically and habitually), especially to practise

10.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)
10.kj: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, ma

10.gl: to take (in the widest variety of applications)
10.kj: accept, bring, buy, carry away, drawn, fetch, get, infold, [idiom] many, mingle, place, receive(-ing), reserve, seize, send for, take (away, -ing, up), use, win.

10.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
10.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

10.gl: intercession, supplication; by implication, a hymn
